solution: 
class Solution:
    def findRepeatedDnaSequences(self, s: str) -> List[str]:
        seen = set()
        res = set()
        for i in range(len(s) - 9):
            tmp = s[i:i+10]
            if tmp in seen:
                res.add(tmp)
            seen.add(tmp)
        return list(res)

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: Utilizes a sliding window approach to generate all 10-letter-long sequences, storing seen sequences in a set for efficient lookups and repeated sequences in another set to avoid duplicates.
